# kCTFontPostScriptCIDNameKey | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Core Text ](/documentation/coretext)

- [ kCTFontPostScriptCIDNameKey ](/documentation/CoreText/kCTFontPostScriptCIDNameKey)

-  kCTFontPostScriptCIDNameKey 

Global Variable# kCTFontPostScriptCIDNameKey

iOS 3.2+iPadOS 3.2+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 2.0+

```
let kCTFontPostScriptCIDNameKey: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/CoreText/kCTFontPostScriptCIDNameKey#Discussion)

The name specifier for the PostScript character identifier (CID) font name.
